defs: Made solid, hard, or compact; united; joined; solidified.
quotes: The Aggregate Fund . . . consisted of a great variety of taxes and surpluses of taxes and duties which were [in 1715] consolidated.
A mass of partially consolidated mud.

defs: Having a small surface in proportion to bulk, as in the cactus.
quotes: Consolidated plants are evidently adapted and designed for very dry regions; in such only they are found.
